full_text:
Yang Ding (Zhengxiu) 楊定 (整脩)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Ding (楊定), styledZhengxiu (整脩). General in Li Jue’s government. Helped Dong Cheng get Emperor Xian away then tried to seize him for himself. Yang Ding was affiliated with Li Jue and the Han Dynasty.
